entries.title: BSc, Mechanical Engineering
entries.organization: Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology

entries.title: Research Intern
entries.organization: Nanomaterials and Energy Storage System (NESS) Lab, CUET
bullets: Investigated black phosphorus-based nanocomposites as high-performance anode materials for lithium-ion batteries
Explored transition-metal-oxide-rich steel slag as a sustainable precursor for lithium-ion battery anode materials
Principal Investigator: Dr. Md. Arafat Rahman

entries.title: Undergraduate Research Thesis
entries.organization: Nanomaterials and Energy Storage System (NESS) Lab, CUET
bullets: Synthesized porous nanostructured iron oxide from transition-metal-oxide-rich industrial steel slag through ball milling, chemical and thermal processing routes
Fabricated iron oxide-based anode materials and assembled lithium-ion coin cells for electrochemical evaluation
Performed materials characterization using XRD and SEM to investigate morphology and phase composition
Conducted electrochemical characterization including GCD testing, CV, and EIS to evaluate battery performance

entries.title: Lithium-ion battery, lithium-air battery, microporous materials, filtration membranes, ion transport, solid-state electrolytes, thermal modelling
Laboratory and Experimental Skills
bullets: Dry chemical synthesis, thermal processing and heat treatment, powder processing, material synthesis, nanomaterial engineering
Electrochemical characterization, glovebox operation, air-sensitive material handling
Equipment: CV, EIS, GCD, SEM, XRD, ball mill, centrifuge, argon glovebox system, 3D printing

entries.title: Computational and Programming Skills
bullets: Programming: Python, MATLAB, C++, PowerShell scripting
Machine learning: Scikit-learn, Keras, TensorFlow, NLP, big data processing
Data visualization: Pandas, NumPy, SciPy, Matplotlib, OpenCV, Origin Pro
Modelling software: ANSYS, SolidWorks, Quantum Espresso, CASTEP, COMSOL Multiphysics
